allow: Bash(cd F:/code/personal-ai && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/mission-control/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(cd F:/code/personal-ai && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/mission-control/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd F:/code/personal-ai && npx vitest run apps/mission-control/src/components/chat/chat-thread-reducer.test.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cd F:/code/personal-ai && npx vitest run apps/mission-control/src/components/OfficeCanvas.coverage.test.tsx apps/mission-control/src/components/OfficeCanvasErrorBoundary.test.tsx apps/mission-control/src/pages/OfficePage.coverage.test.tsx apps/mission-control/src/data/office-zones.test.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd F:/code/personal-ai && npx vitest run apps/mission-control/src/components/OfficeCanvas.coverage.test.tsx --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -15)
Bash(cd F:/code/personal-ai && npx vitest run apps/mission-control/src/pages/OfficePage.asset-status.test.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -15)

PreToolUse.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||''; if(f.startsWith('config/')||f.includes('/config/')){console.error('BLOCKED: config files require manual review - '+f);process.exit(1)}"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||''; const p=require('path'); if(!['.ts','.tsx'].includes(p.extname(f)))process.exit(0); const app=f.includes('mission-control')?'apps/mission-control':'apps/gateway'; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{const r=execSync('npx tsc --noEmit -p '+app+'/tsconfig.json 2>&1',{timeout:30000,encoding:'utf8'}); console.log('typecheck passed')}catch(e){const lines=(e.stdout||'').split('\n'); console.error(lines.slice(-8).join('\n')); process.exit(1)}"

node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||''; if(!f.endsWith('.test.ts')&&!f.endsWith('.test.tsx'))process.exit(0); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{execSync('npx vitest run '+f+' --reporter=verbose 2>&1',{timeout:30000,encoding:'utf8',stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){process.exit(1)}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||''; if(!f)process.exit(0); try{const lines=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').split('\n').length; if(lines>800){console.error('WARNING: file exceeds 800 lines ('+lines+' lines) - consider splitting: '+f)}}catch(e){}"

node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||''; if(!f.startsWith('config/')||!f.endsWith('.json'))process.exit(0); const fs=require('fs'); try{JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log('JSON valid: '+f)}catch(e){console.error('Invalid JSON in '+f+': '+e.message); process.exit(1)}"

Stop.command: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); console.log('Running final validation gates...'); try{execSync('pnpm -r typecheck 2>&1',{timeout:120000,encoding:'utf8',stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('typecheck passed')}catch(e){console.error('typecheck failed'); process.exit(1)}" && node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{execSync('pnpm -r test 2>&1',{timeout:120000,encoding:'utf8',stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('tests passed')}catch(e){console.error('tests failed'); process.exit(1)}"
